THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TABARSI, ABDOL AKA ABDOL H. TABARSI AKA AH H. TABARSI $15,370.07 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,094.85 INTEREST, $420.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,404.92, SEE SCANNED DOC
